subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness unto His Own Self, through His Own Self, that verily I am alive in the Most Glorious Horizon, whereupon My Self, My Being and My Essence do bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله لنفسه بنفسه باننی انا حی فی افق الابهی اذا یشهد نفسی و ذاتی و کینونتی
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @suffering and imprisonment
